✨ Now available on iOS & Android

Don't remember it.
Nabbo it.

Forward the school email. Share the WhatsApp message. Speak the reminder. Nabbo turns your family's chaos into clear actions.

Download for iOS Download for Android

How it works

Three steps. From chaos to clarity in seconds.

📨

1. Capture

Share from any app, forward an email, or just speak. Nabbo accepts school emails, WhatsApp messages, screenshots, voice notes — anything.

🧠

2. Understand

AI extracts the actions: who, what, when, where, what to bring, what to pay. Not a summary — real operational meaning.

✅

3. Review & Go

Quick-approve what Nabbo found, or tap to edit. Approved items become your family's clear plan — with reminders and checklists.

Built for real family life

Not another calendar. Not another to-do app. An AI assistant that understands family logistics.

📧 Email forwarding

Your household gets a unique Nabbo email. Forward school newsletters, booking confirmations, payment reminders — Nabbo reads them all.

📱 Share from anywhere

Share from WhatsApp, Messages, school apps, browsers. Text, images, screenshots, PDFs — just tap share and pick Nabbo.

🎙️ Voice capture

"Adam has football Friday at 6:30, bring blue jersey." Speak naturally, Nabbo turns it into structured actions.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family members

Nabbo knows your kids, assigns items to the right person, and shows you who's affected by each action.

🔄 Change detection

Training moved to Thursday? Time changed? Nabbo detects updates to existing items and flags what changed.

🔔 Smart reminders

Deadline approaching, payment due, permission slip not signed — Nabbo nudges you at the right time.
